The '''Great Hall''' was a large auditorium built by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in their hidden base on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]]. It was used for ceremonies where a large number of Alliance personnel would attend. The Great Hall was used in the ceremony to recognize the heroics of [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] in saving her fellow [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] members' lives on [[Shalyvane]]. Brie was awarded the [[Burdine Cluster]] and promoted to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] by Rebel leader [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].
